summary: Comprehensive testing of Vyapaar Network CRM Iteration 4 features completed. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for Notifications, Grid Report, Lead Referral (Sales Associate + Internal Request), and SortableTable component features.
passed_tests: Sales Associate can create lead referral
Sales Associate can view their referrals
Selling Partner can create internal request (is_internal_request=true)
Grid report access - admin only (403 for non-admin)
Grid report summary stats (total_leads, won_deals, lost_deals, total_deal_value, total_vyapaar_commission, total_partner_revenue)
Grid report partner summary with conversion rates
Grid report filters (date range, partner, category, status)

lead_referral_sales_associate.details: Sales Associates can now create lead referrals. Referrals are saved with referred_by_associate_id and Draft status.

lead_referral_internal_request.details: Selling Partners can create Internal Requests (is_internal_request=true) for their company needs. Dialog pre-fills partner details as customer.

notifications_bell_icon.details: Bell icon in header shows unread notification count. Dropdown displays notifications with type icons and timestamps.

notifications_navigation.details: Clicking a notification with lead_id navigates to the lead detail page.

notifications_mark_read.details: Mark as read (single) and Mark all read buttons work correctly.

grid_report_summary.details: Summary stats show Total Leads, Won Deals, Lost Deals, Total Deal Value, Vyapaar Commission, Partner Revenue.

grid_report_partner_summary.details: Partner Performance Summary table with sortable columns showing partner metrics and conversion rates.

grid_report_detailed_grid.details: Detailed Lead Grid with all lead data, sortable columns, and clickable rows for navigation.

grid_report_filters.details: Filters for date range, partner, category, status with Apply and Clear buttons.

grid_report_export_csv.details: Export CSV button available for downloading report data.

sortable_table_sorting.details: Column headers are clickable for sorting (asc/desc). Sort indicator shows current sort direction.

sortable_table_search.details: Global search filters all columns. Shows filtered count vs total count.

sortable_table_pagination.details: Pagination with page numbers, first/last/prev/next buttons. Shows 'X of Y results'.

sms_notifications.details: Twilio SMS integration code is present but credentials not configured. Will log warning but not fail.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_features.py - Created new test file for Iteration 4 features
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing: sales associates for referral testing. Test referrals and internal requests created via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 4 features are working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_features.py cover Lead Referral (Sales Associate + Internal Request), Notifications, and Grid Report functionality. The SortableTable component is used in Grid Report page with sorting, search, and pagination features. SMS notifications via Twilio are MOCKED - credentials not configured yet, will log warning but not fail. The Grid Report page is only accessible to Super Admin role.

twilio_sms.reason: Twilio credentials (TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER) not configured in backend/.env
twilio_sms.behavior: Logs warning 'Twilio credentials not configured, skipping SMS' but does not fail
